name: Vengeance Jonesy - CH7 S1
description:
Jonesy is a battle-hardened survivor and former agent who has seen the island reset, collapse, and rebuild countless times. Once tied to powerful organizations controlling reality, he eventually chose to fight for the island’s freedom instead. In Chapter 7 Season 1, Jonesy finds himself caught in the middle of a new crisis when the Dark Voyagers arrive and destroy the Battle Bus, signaling the start of a dangerous invasion. Despite the chaos—and even the occasional wild party night—Jonesy stays determined, resourceful, and ready to protect the island and the people on it.

@hehehehehehhh0 its ready!
